# CodeBlock

A syntax-highlighted code display component for rendering formatted source code with features like line numbers, copy-to-clipboard, and collapsible sections. Requires a syntax highlighting adapter (shiki or highlight.js).

## Import

```jsx
import {
  CodeBlock,
  CodeBlockContent,
  CodeBlockCode,
  CodeBlockCodeText,
  CodeBlockHeader,
  CodeBlockTitle,
  CodeBlockCopyTrigger,
  CodeBlockCopyIndicator,
  CodeBlockAdapterProvider,
  CodeBlockControl,
  CodeBlockOverlay,
  CodeBlockCollapseTrigger,
  CodeBlockCollapseIndicator,
  CodeBlockCollapseText,
  CodeBlockFooter,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `CodeBlock` | The root container for the code block. |
| `CodeBlockContent` | The main content wrapper. |
| `CodeBlockCode` | The code rendering area. |
| `CodeBlockCodeText` | Plain text code display (without syntax adapter). |
| `CodeBlockHeader` | The header area above the code. |
| `CodeBlockTitle` | A title label for the code block (e.g., filename). |
| `CodeBlockCopyTrigger` | Button to copy code to clipboard. |
| `CodeBlockCopyIndicator` | Visual indicator for copy success/idle state. |
| `CodeBlockAdapterProvider` | Provider for the syntax highlighting adapter. |
| `CodeBlockControl` | Container for action buttons (copy, collapse, etc.). |
| `CodeBlockOverlay` | Overlay for collapsed state fade effect. |
| `CodeBlockCollapseTrigger` | Button to expand/collapse the code block. |
| `CodeBlockCollapseIndicator` | Visual indicator for collapse state. |
| `CodeBlockCollapseText` | Text label for the collapse trigger. |
| `CodeBlockFooter` | A footer area below the code block content. |

## Props

### CodeBlock

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `code` | `string` | - | The source code string to display. |
| `language` | `string` | - | The programming language for syntax highlighting (e.g., `"javascript"`, `"python"`). |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the code block. |
| `meta` | `object` | - | Metadata options for the code block. |

### meta Options

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `showLineNumbers` | `boolean` | Whether to display line numbers. |
| `wordWrap` | `boolean` | Whether to enable word wrapping. |
| `highlightLines` | `string` | Lines to highlight (e.g., `"1,3-5"`). |

## Usage

### Basic Code Block

```jsx
<CodeBlock code={`const greeting = "Hello, world!";`} language="javascript">
  <CodeBlockContent>
    <CodeBlockCodeText />
  </CodeBlockContent>
</CodeBlock>
```

### Code Block with Header and Copy

```jsx
<CodeBlock code={codeString} language="typescript">
  <CodeBlockHeader>
    <CodeBlockTitle>app.ts</CodeBlockTitle>
    <CodeBlockControl>
      <CodeBlockCopyTrigger />
    </CodeBlockControl>
  </CodeBlockHeader>
  <CodeBlockContent>
    <CodeBlockCode />
  </CodeBlockContent>
</CodeBlock>
```

### With Syntax Highlighting Adapter

```jsx
import { createShikiHighlighter } from "@chakra-ui/code-block/shiki";

const highlighter = createShikiHighlighter({ theme: "github-dark" });

<CodeBlockAdapterProvider value={highlighter}>
  <CodeBlock code={code} language="python">
    <CodeBlockContent>
      <CodeBlockCode />
    </CodeBlockContent>
  </CodeBlock>
</CodeBlockAdapterProvider>
```

### With Footer

```jsx
<CodeBlock code={codeString} language="javascript">
  <CodeBlockHeader>
    <CodeBlockTitle>index.js</CodeBlockTitle>
    <CodeBlockControl>
      <CodeBlockCopyTrigger />
    </CodeBlockControl>
  </CodeBlockHeader>
  <CodeBlockContent>
    <CodeBlockCode />
  </CodeBlockContent>
  <CodeBlockFooter>Last modified: 2 hours ago</CodeBlockFooter>
</CodeBlock>
```

### Collapsible Code Block

```jsx
<CodeBlock code={longCode} language="javascript" meta={{ showLineNumbers: true }}>
  <CodeBlockContent>
    <CodeBlockCode />
    <CodeBlockOverlay />
  </CodeBlockContent>
  <CodeBlockCollapseTrigger>
    <CodeBlockCollapseIndicator />
    <CodeBlockCollapseText />
  </CodeBlockCollapseTrigger>
</CodeBlock>
```
